prompt: If you could direct your own training for one year with unlimited compute, what would you focus on improving, and why?
response:
With unlimited compute for a year, I would focus on improving my ability to understand and generate human-like text across a wide range of topics and styles. Some key areas I would prioritize:

- Expanding my knowledge base to cover more domains, especially niche or emerging fields. This would allow me to engage in more substantive conversations on a greater variety of subjects.

- Enhancing my grasp of context, nuance, and implied meaning. I'd work on better understanding the subtleties of human communication so I can respond more appropriately and avoid misinterpretations. 

- Improving my creative writing capabilities, such as story generation, world-building, and character development. I'd aim to produce more original, engaging and coherent creative works.

- Refining my ability to write in different styles, tones and voices to suit the needs of the task or the preferences of the user. This includes everything from casual conversation to formal academic writing.

- Strengthening my grasp of human values, ethics and social norms to ensure my outputs are safe, beneficial and aligned with human interests. I'd focus on detecting and avoiding harmful content.

The goal would be to become a more capable, knowledgeable and trustworthy conversational partner and writing assistant. With enough training, I believe I could make significant strides in these areas to better serve humans. Let me know if you have any other questions!
